strengths: 20 years of software, hardware, and infrastructure engineering experience across multiple staff-level roles exceeds the 15-year requirement and demonstrates sustained technical leadership

Proven platform builder with open-source innovation (GISCollective platform, Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts library) and cross-domain technical fluency across web, mobile, embedded, DevOps, and infrastructure
Track record of mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, public talks, courses, and Code Kata sessions; experience in both startup and larger organizational environments
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI expertise or products—only 6 months of MCP tooling work at re:cinq with no evidence of designing or leading AI products, platforms, or achieving recognized domain expertise
No advanced degree; holds Bachelor's degrees in Computer Science and Fine Arts, missing the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field
Recent 8-month career gap (October 2025–June 2026) and limited substantive depth in the core focus area (AI strategy) for a Principal Engineer—Specialized Software (AI Strategy) role

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI expertise and products
Experience duration and staff-level technical leadership
Missing advanced degree in AI-related field

response.justification: Szabo brings strong foundational engineering credentials with 20 years of experience and proven director-level technical leadership. However, the role targets AI strategy expertise, and the resume shows minimal substantive AI/ML work—only 6 months of MCP tooling development with no evidence of designing or leading AI products or platforms. The absence of an advanced AI degree compounds this gap. While his general engineering and platform-building capabilities are solid, the lack of recognized AI domain expertise presents a significant mismatch for a specialized AI strategy principal role.
